positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a mythical forest creature, perhaps a griffin or a wise owl, rendered in a minimalist, abstract stained-glass style. The creature should be framed centrally, composed of interlocking shapes and vibrant, contrasting jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, ruby red) against a deep, complementary midnight blue background. Include detailed, linear outlines giving it a silhouette-like quality. The overall aesthetic must be perfect for screen printing on dark fabric, featuring bold color blocks and high contrast edges, evoking Art Nouveau meeting Art Deco geometry. Concept art, clean lines, symmetrical composition, vector illustration quality, print-friendly, isolated subject, intricate detailing.
negative: blurry, grainy, photorealism, poor composition, noise, text, watermark, logo, dirty, low detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature
